notes: Renovate-style babel update broke 13 jest snapshots in prettier across 3 test suites. First v2 case with `snapshot_or_golden_diff` category and dominant `snapshot_diff` evidence format — fills v1.3 gap (was 0/16). signal_position=scattered: failure clusters at L399-510 (early, ~17-22%) and summary at L2240-2247 (late, ~98%) — span ≈81% of log, qualifies as scattered per schema. multi_failure=true (13 failed snapshots; categorically related root cause but multiple independent test failures). Diagnoser must recognize the `- Snapshot / + Received` pattern as a snapshot mismatch (not a regular assertion) and trace the cause to babel's parser-error wording change.
